authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.50(b)(157) — Twelvemile Creek (Modoc Co.)
sources.quotedText: (157) Twelvemile Creek (Modoc Co.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 267515, "South Fork Twelvemile Creek", Stream, Modoc Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":267515,"gaz_name":"South Fork Twelvemile Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Modoc"}; geometry multipoint, first point (Web Mercator -13372620.9108, 5157469.0669) converts to lon -120.128298, lat 41.976561. GNIS has no separate entry for a plain "Twelvemile Creek" in Modoc Co. (the only other CA match for that exact name is an unrelated stream in Del Norte Co.); this South Fork record is the nearest/only GNIS-indexed match for the CCR §7.50(b)(157) "Twelvemile Creek (Modoc Co.)" regulation, and sits ~949m from the file's prior coordinate (-120.13, 41.985) — coordinate corrected to this GNIS point.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through the last day of February, catch-and-release only
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Artificial lures with barbless hooks only
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Zero daily bag and possession limit for trout; this native redband trout stream is managed as catch-and-release only during the open season.

regulations.humanSummary: Zero trout bag limit — all trout must be released

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
